title: Extra Compensation on Sponsored Projects Policy
content: Defines the limited circumstances under which faculty and staff may receive extra (intra- or inter-institutional) compensation from sponsored project funds in addition to their regular institutional base salary, including summer salary and outside-of-period work. Aligned with federal cost principles in 2 CFR 200.430. Compiled in PI Handbook 5 (effective 2024-07-01). Full policy details in PI Handbook 5.
